name: Множественная продажа автомобилей одним пользователем [3] 3
description: Тест проверяет продажу нескольких автомобилей одним пользователем
descriptionHtml: Тест проверяет продажу нескольких автомобилей одним пользователем

testStage.description: Тест проверяет продажу нескольких автомобилей одним пользователем

steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") set value(Schowalter, Schowalter and Hegmann)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[4]/input") set value(Albert Runcorn)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")

parameters.name: car
parameters.value: Car(engineType=CNG, mark=Schowalter, Schowalter and Hegmann, model=Albert Runcorn, price=7060.84)

steps.name: Проверка успешности создания автомобиля и получение его id
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div/div/button[3]") should not be(empty: attribute value="" and exact text "")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should have(match text ".*\d+.*")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table") should be(visible)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Car Id')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should have(match text ".*\d+.*")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[4]/input") set value(Madam Malkin)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")

parameters.name: car
parameters.value: Car(engineType=Hydrogenic, mark=Purdy, Marks and Champlin, model=Justin Finch-Fletchley, price=8233.85)
